name: Smoked Oyster Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters well and discard any that are open or appear spoiled.
2. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese with 1 tablespoon of sour cream until smooth.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce to the mixture and stir gently.
4. Sprinkle seasoned salt over the cream cheese-oyster mixture.
5. Chop the oysters into small pieces.
6. Spread half of the cream cheese mixture onto a sheet of waxed paper.
7. Lay the chopped oysters down in the middle of the spread.
8. Roll up the sides to form a tight roll, enclosing the oysters completely.
9. Let the roll set overnight in the refrigerator.
10. Garnish with additional seasoned salt, chopped oysters, or parsley if desired.
11. Slice the rolls and serve on crackers.
